prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；食品科学与工程类热度平稳；辽宁省2026年高考报名总人数约20万，较2025年基本持平；按近年比例估算物理类考生约14.84万人，较2025年14.34万人小幅增加约3.5%，竞争略有加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在辽宁省属跨省招生；2025年该校在辽宁省招生141人，占全国总招生5575人的约2.5%，占比稳定；该校约62%招生名额留在本省（黑龙江），外省份额有限，辽宁省考生报考需考虑地域距离因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次50149、2026年扩招约5.1%对竞争的加剧作用、辽宁省物理类考生小幅增加约3.5%以及学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约51729名，区间51229–52229名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 24068 → 25526 → 64853 (gap in 2023) → 57332 → 50149. In recent two years, it has been continuously recovering from the gap low, with a baseline of about 50149 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 112 in 2021, 129 in 2022, 126 in 2023, 126 in 2024, and 118 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 124, an increase of about 5.1% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that moderately intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranks approximately 120th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, fluctuating between 116 and 122 in recent years, overall stable. In the reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, no significant negative or positive events were recorded, with stable public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 95, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no abnormal increase in application attention. There is no record of historical admission anomalies for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be hot/highly recommended. Food Science and Engineering has stable popularity. The total number of Gaokao registrants in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, roughly the same as in 2025. Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 148,400 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase of about 3.5% from 143,400 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and recruits across provinces in Liaoning. In 2025, the university enrolled 141 students in Liaoning, accounting for about 2.5% of the total national enrollment of 5,575, a stable proportion. About 62% of the university's enrollment quota stays within its home province (Heilongjiang), with limited quotas for other provinces. Candidates from Liaoning need to consider the geographical distance factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 50149, the intensifying effect of a 5.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, a slight increase of about 3.5% in Physics Category candidates in Liaoning, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to slightly shift backward from the 2025 level. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 51729, with a range of 51229–52229.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 51729, with a range of 51229–52229. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (51229) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Data Science, etc.). Candidates in the middle of the range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering A-, Veterinary Medicine, Statistics, etc.), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. Candidates near the upper limit of the range are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing Environmental Science, Engineering Management, Human Geography, etc. Sino-foreign cooperative education programs (China-US Dual Degree) have lower ranking requirements but higher tuition fees, suitable as a safety choice for candidates with study abroad intentions.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4128 → 4176 → 5556 → 9529 → 9105, showing an overall backward trend, peaking at 9529 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 9105 in 2025, with fluctuations stabilizing in recent two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for History Category was 12 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16, a significant reduction of about 30.4% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its 2026 Soft Science Chinese University main ranking is approximately 120th, stable in recent years; no significant negative or positive events appeared in the 2021–2026 reputation evaluation documents, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 95, rated as 'average', with no abnormal signals of application attention; no historical abnormal admission records; Food Science and Engineering A- is the only A- or above discipline, but no directly corresponding food majors in History Category enrollment, limiting appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors are mainly economics/management and language: Finance Class wait-and-see, Business Administration Class wait-and-see, Chinese International Education slightly hot recommended; Liaoning Province 2026 total college entrance exam registrants about 200,000, estimated History Category candidates about 51,600 based on recent proportion, down about 8.4% from 2025's 56,300, a significant decrease; Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, cross-province enrollment in Liaoning; in 2025, the university enrolled 141 in Liaoning (including Physics and History Categories), with History Category accounting for about 16.3%; about 62% of enrollment stays in the home province, limited out-of-province share.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9105, the significant 30.4% enrollment reduction in 2026 alleviating competition, the 8.4% decrease in Liaoning History Category candidates, and stable university reputation, the 2026 minimum admission ranking for History Category is expected to move significantly forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 7412, range 6912–7912.
